sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n14171" key="a)pouri/a" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἀπουρία</orth>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ἡ</gen>, <sense id="n14171.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">issue of free and slave,</tr_> <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Suid.</author></bibl>, <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Zonar.</author> </bibl> </sense> </entryFree>
